title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of India! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of India:
Bank of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India!
